reason: Check public docs and release changes against locked project-wide decisions.
Check docs/media paths, music asset handling, and package layout hygiene.
Check that final release gates include typecheck, determinism, replay, and build.
Check release polish does not introduce performance/logging regressions.
Check default audio/local track documentation and license notes against M5 contract.
Check README media reflects the actual procedural silhouette/glow visual identity.
Check controls and UI descriptions in README/media match the shipped UI.
